name: heist-deck-compendium
description: Duskwall Heist Deck — Foundry VTT module build scripts

scripts.compile: fvtt package pack --type Module --id heist-deck-compendium --in packs/src/people      --out packs/people      && fvtt package pack --type Module --id heist-deck-compendium --in packs/src/treasures   --out packs/treasures   && fvtt package pack --type Module --id heist-deck-compendium --in packs/src/obstacles   --out packs/obstacles   && fvtt package pack --type Module --id heist-deck-compendium --in packs/src/heist-tables --out packs/heist-tables
scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run compile
